# OSAllocatedUnfairLock.Ownership.notOwner

**Case**

Describes code that doesn’t own the lock.

## Declaration

```swift
case notOwner
```

## Specifying ownership

- **OSAllocatedUnfairLock.Ownership.owner**: Describes code that owns the lock.
